title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers

seo.title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers: Authentic Turkish Recipe

seo.imageAlt: Close-up of grilled Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers with vibrant marinade, served with fresh herbs and lemon wedges.
seo.imageCaption: Perfectly grilled Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers, a delicious and authentic taste of Turkey.

description: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers are a beloved Turkish classic, featuring tender chicken pieces marinated in a flavorful blend of yogurt, olive oil, and aromatic spices. Grilled to perfection, these succulent skewers offer a delightful taste of Anatolian cuisine. Enjoy this authentic dish bursting with rich, savory flavors, perfect for any gathering.

ingredients.item: Boneless, skinless chicken breasts or thighs

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken
instructions.text: Begin by patting the chicken cubes dry with paper towels. This helps the marinade adhere better and promotes better browning when grilled. Ensure all pieces are roughly the same size for even cooking.

instructions.title: Mix the Marinade
instructions.text: In a large bowl, combine the plain yogurt, olive oil, tomato paste, minced garlic, sweet paprika, ground cumin, dried oregano, salt, black pepper, and fresh lemon juice. If using, add the grated onion. Whisk all ingredients together until you have a smooth, well-combined marinade.

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: Add the prepared chicken cubes to the marinade, ensuring each piece is thoroughly coated. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight (up to 24 hours) for maximum flavor and tenderness. The longer the marinade, the better the taste.

instructions.title: Prepare Skewers
instructions.text: If you are using wooden skewers, immerse them in water for at least 30 minutes before threading the chicken. This prevents them from burning on the grill. If using metal skewers, no soaking is needed.

instructions.title: Thread the Skewers
instructions.text: Remove the marinated chicken from the refrigerator. Thread the chicken cubes onto the soaked wooden or metal skewers, leaving a small space between each piece to ensure even cooking. Do not pack them too tightly.

instructions.title: Preheat and Grill
instructions.text: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat. Lightly oil the grill grates to prevent sticking. Place the chicken skewers on the hot grill. Cook for 15-20 minutes, turning them every 4-5 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through, juicy, and has a beautiful char on all sides. An internal temperature of 74C (165F) indicates doneness.

instructions.title: Rest and Serve
instructions.text: Once cooked, remove the Tavuk Sis from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving. This allows the juices to redistribute, ensuring the chicken remains tender and moist. Serve hot with pilaf, fresh salad, and warm pita bread.

tips: For the most authentic flavor, ensure your chicken marinates for at least 8 hours or overnight. The yogurt and lemon juice tenderize the meat beautifully while the spices infuse deeply.
If you don't have a grill, Tavuk Sis can also be cooked in a hot oven (200C/400F) on a baking sheet, or pan-fried in a cast-iron skillet, turning frequently until cooked through and browned.

Serve your Tavuk Sis with traditional Turkish accompaniments like a refreshing shepherd's salad (Çoban Salata), fluffy bulgur pilaf, a dollop of cooling cacik (cucumber-yogurt dip), and warm lavash bread.
article: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers is a beloved Turkish Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
